title: Lesson 201: (Grammar) - do such things as A and B

intro_cards.title: Listing Actions: たり〜たり
intro_cards.body:
たり〜たり lists multiple actions as examples (implying there are others not mentioned).

Pattern: [た-form] + り [た-form] + りする

• 週末は映画を見たり、本を読んだりします。
(On weekends I do things like watch movies and read books.)
• 泣いたり笑ったりした。(I cried and laughed — back and forth.)

Key: it's non-exhaustive — just examples among other activities.

と vs たり〜たり:
• と lists everything (exhaustive)
• たり〜たり lists examples (non-exhaustive)
